mapper.select: SELECT id, discovery_id, scenario_type, recommendation_level, confidence, reason, CAST(evidence_refs_jsonb AS TEXT) AS evidence_refs_jsonb, suggested_start_url, CAST(suggested_target_jsonb AS TEXT) AS suggested_target_jsonb, created_at FROM scenario_recommendation WHERE discovery_id = #{discoveryId} ORDER BY confidence DESC, created_at ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO scenario_recommendation ( id, discovery_id, scenario_type, recommendation_level, confidence, reason, evidence_refs_jsonb, suggested_start_url, suggested_target_jsonb ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{discoveryId}, #{scenarioType}, #{recommendationLevel}, #{confidence}, #{reason}, CAST(#{evidenceRefsJsonb} AS jsonb), #{suggestedStartUrl}, CAST(#{suggestedTargetJsonb} AS jsonb) )
